response.overview: Inspired by the profound poetry of Jibanananda Das, Soul of Nature is a cinematic exploration rooted in the philosophy of "Poetic Cinema" and "Raw Realism." The film delves deeply into the primal, intricate, and existential connection between humanity and the natural environment. Through a visually arresting and philosophical narrative, it mirrors the poetic essence of ecology, the rhythms of nature, and the raw realities of human existence.
response.tagline: The primal connection between humanity and nature
response.title: Soul of Nature
